column1: # M7 slice 4 — F10 shows a full-screen graph. This is the M7
# acceptance bar: seed numbers, pick a bar type, assign A1..A5 as
# series A, press F10, verify block characters appear and the mode
# indicator reads GRAPH. Esc returns to READY.
# F10 transitions to GRAPH with block characters on screen.
# Esc returns to READY, graph state preserved.
# F10 again from READY still works (rotates back into view).
# Empty graph → F10 still transitions but shows placeholder.
